title: Generative Calm
summary: A meditative, full-screen ambient interface where location-based generative music is centered as the primary experience. The minimalist layout uses monochromatic text and a serene blue gradient to create space for sound visualization and contemplation.
typography: Monospaced serif or system font, all-caps, letter-spaced, uppercase; hierarchy through scale and position rather than weight or color. Text rendered in subdued teal/slate against the blue background for low contrast, supporting quiet introspection.
layout: Centered vertical axis with three distinct zones: long-form descriptive text block in the upper-middle (two paragraph breaks), prominent call-to-action ("TOUCH TO BEGIN") below at center, and footer attribution at bottom. Massive surrounding white space (blue negative space) creates focus and breathing room. No sidebar, nav, or chrome—pure content-first.
takeaways: Use generous vertical rhythm and whitespace to create stillness and encourage slow reading—especially for conceptual/philosophical copy
Monospaced uppercase typography reads as technical yet approachable; pair with tight letter-spacing for a modern, crafted look
Center a single call-to-action low on the page to guide the next step without visual noise or urgency
Muted, low-contrast text (slate on blue) signals introspection and calm over high-impact visual hierarchy
A gradient or solid calm color field as the entire background reduces cognitive load and supports immersive, focused experiences
